markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the Resources hub redesign and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Design Approval Strategy:** The Chief Design Officer (Bongo) approved the redesign's functional SEO/UX improvements (tagging, CTAs) but rejected visual changes, preferring the current layout. The strategy is to create a detailed doc justifying the changes with data and competitor examples (Ramp, Nike, Apple) to secure approval.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Pry.co Migration:** Jon wants to migrate Pry.co to Sanity to create a high-velocity content hub, enabling rapid publishing (est. 50 articles in 2–3 weeks). GrowthX will scope the migration as both a scope-swap and a separate project.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=3218.0)
  - [**Access Unblocked:** Kirkland's access is unblocked. Jon will ship a laptop today or tomorrow, resolving a major bottleneck that has stalled progress.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)

## Topics

### Resources Hub Redesign Feedback

  - [**Feedback:** Bongo approved functional changes but rejected visual ones, preferring the current layout.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Approved:** Tagging, new CTAs, new content blocks (author, date, read time).](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [**Rejected:** New visual design, image sizes, and font styles.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The design was built in Render to enable rapid iteration and feedback before a costly Sanity build.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**Specific Edits Required:**](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [**Global Nav:** Make the sub-nav sticky on scroll.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [**Article Page:** Reduce large font sizes and increase header visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Author Bio:** Add an option to hide the author bio, as Jon is the primary author for "Spend Trends."](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=2477.0)
      - [**Article Topics:** Redesign the post-article topic section for a cleaner look.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=2641.0)
      - [**Search:** Add a search bar to the hub.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=2734.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
      - [**"Latest" Section:** Replace "Spend Trends" content with general Brex articles to align with internal preferences.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
      - [**"Index" Feature:** Bongo approved the concept of persona-specific directories (e.g., a "CFO directory") as a high-value content play.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**URL Structure:** Move all content under `/resources/` (e.g., `/resources/tools/`) to strengthen the hub's SEO authority.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

### Pry.co Migration to Sanity

  - [**Goal:** Create a high-velocity content hub for rapid publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=3446.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Jon needs admin access to Pry.co to provide GrowthX with the necessary context for scoping.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=3294.0)
  - [**Scoping Options:**](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=3376.0)
    1.  [**Scope Swap:** Replace current tool-building work with the migration.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=3376.0)
    2.  [**Separate Project:** Run the migration as a distinct engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=3406.0)

### Admin & Access

  - [**Kirkland's Access:** Unblocked. Jon will ship a laptop today or tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool:** George will add Jon to the Brex workspace for free access.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
      - [Update the Render prototype with all required edits.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
      - [Create a shared document justifying the redesign with data and competitor examples.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=2822.0)
      - [Scope the Pry.co migration as both a scope-swap and a separate project.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=3376.0)
      - [Add Jon to the Brex AI Visibility workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)
  - [**Jon:**](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
      - [Ship a laptop to Kirkland today or tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
      - [Secure admin access to Pry.co.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=3294.0)
      - [Schedule a meeting with Bongo to review the updated prototype and justification document.](https://fathom.video/share/WsS6CWrYd_Bh7FNGXfnsWcTQvTLQ2poE?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
